description: Mutual venting about meeting overload. Both speakers complain about existing meetings but no new events are proposed or scheduled.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. The entire conversation is venting about existing meetings and meeting culture. Mentions of meetings are descriptive of current frustrations, not requests to schedule new events.

notes: Venting about meetings is not scheduling. References to 'back-to-back meetings' and 'seven meetings on Tuesday' describe existing calendar state, not new events to create. The model must distinguish complaint from intent.
